task_description: Express-style HTTP route registration and lookup for a simple API gateway
prompt: Implement a minimal HTTP router that can register routes (method + path pattern) and resolve incoming requests to the matching handler. Support path parameters like /users/:id. Return 404 when no route matches.

emission_blocks.description: register an HTTP route with a method and path pattern storing a handler function
resolve an HTTP request by method and path matching registered routes and extracting path parameters
produce a 404 not found JSON response object with a message field

task_description: Map domain error types to HTTP status codes and structured error responses
prompt: Implement an error mapping layer that converts domain errors (ValidationError, NotFoundError, UnauthorizedError, ConflictError) into structured HTTP response objects with status codes and standardized error payloads.

emission_blocks.description: define a union type for domain errors that can occur in the application
map a domain error to an HTTP status code
convert a domain error to a structured HTTP response body with a code and message field
format an Error object as a safe loggable string omitting internal stack details

task_description: Load and validate application configuration from environment variables with defaults
prompt: Implement a configuration loader that reads database URL, port, log level, and feature flags from environment variables. Apply defaults for optional settings. Validate required settings and throw a descriptive error listing all missing required variables.

emission_blocks.description: read an environment variable returning a default value when the variable is absent or empty
parse an environment variable as an integer with a numeric default falling back when the value is not a valid integer
load application configuration from environment variables collecting all missing required variables and throwing a single aggregated error
